description: Radiation therapy courses administered to the patient.

items.name: Radiation Type
items.description: Type of radiation therapy (e.g., external_beam, SBRT, SRS, brachytherapy, proton)

items.name: Radiation Start Date
items.description: Start date of radiation therapy, as specific as is known. Format YYYY-MM-DD when possible.

items.name: Radiation End Date
items.description: End date of radiation therapy, as specific as is known. Format YYYY-MM-DD when possible.
